title: Fluffy Midnight Craving Malaysian Minced Meat Wrap
description: A midnight craving dish featuring a fluffy, fermented mince meat filling wrapped in toast for an easy whole30-friendly breakfast or snack option.
instructions: Place the toasted bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread the fermented minced meat filling evenly over each slice of toast.
Drizzle the whole milk yogurt over the top of the meat mixture for added moisture and flavor.
Top with avocado slices if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly before serving.
